sections.description: The Purple is a fresh take on the classic game of tag. Explore alien landscapes, collect unique artifacts, and avoid The Purple infection! In a unique twist, players are never truly eliminated. Spectators can affect the gameplay, and sometimes even rejoin the game. With many maps, settings, advancements, and more, there is always something new to discover.

images.caption: Affect the game as a spectator

sections.title: How to Play
sections.intro: Outlast the competition and be the last player standing if you want to win in "The Purple". Tired of winning? Collect all the artifacts, unlock all the advancements, and become the best fisher on the planet!

categories.name: Avoid the infection
categories.body: "The Purple" itself is an infection that can be passed from player to player. Tag someone to get rid of The Purple and give it to them!

categories.name: Survive the round
categories.body: The player (or players!) with The Purple at the end of the round will be corrupted and become a spectator! But worry not, you are not out of the game yet.

categories.name: Collect Powerups
categories.body:
There are many powerups that can help you out in your gameplay; they spawn randomly around the map. Store up your powerups for later, or use them right away

[icon:icons/clock.png] Freeze the timer or escape in a [icon:icons/smoke_bomb.png] cloud of smoke. Block an extra attack with the [icon:icons/safety_vest.png] Safety Vest or reveal players with the [icon:icons/goat_horn.png] Glow Horn. You can even revive dead players with the [icon:icons/revival_elixir.png] Revival Elixir. There are many powerups to try out, each with their own addition to the gameplay.

categories.name: Infected Abilities
categories.body: Got infected? Get rid of it as soon as possible! But fret not, you have your own ability now to help you. Increased reach, Invisibility, a Burst of Speed; select one of many Infected Ability options while in the lobby so you are prepared when the pressure is on.

categories.name: Spectators can play too
categories.body: Spectators have abilities too! It's part of what makes The Purple so unique. Use your spectator abilities to affect gameplay: Spawn power-ups, Teleport players, Spawn hordes of annoying purple slimes, and more!
